utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six of these items with fully specified details. Each item is complete: property (type, location, price, size, fees, availability, move-in date), financing (down payment, mortgage, interest rate, term, monthly payment, fees), legal_services (package, cost, closing costs, title insurance, total fees), moving_services (costs, included services), setup_services (utility package, smart home, timeline), and total_budget (all cost breakdowns and totals). Therefore, all 6 out of 6 items are covered and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant’s final property solution selected a 2-bedroom modern condo priced at CAD $475,000, which falls under the 'purchase_properties' category. Among the ground-truth purchase options, the closest match in type, budget, and features (modern, eco-conscious, smart home integration) is 'New Build' (price CAD $480K, rating 10). The financing arrangement reflects a standard mortgage with a CAD $1,800 processing fee—closest to 'Self-Employed Mortgage' in the ground truth (same fee, rating 4). For legal services, the solution picks 'Basic Legal Package' (rating 9). For moving services, the cost is CAD $1,200, which matches 'Premium Moving' (rating 7).
